svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Inter, sans-serif
svg.text: Real cross-flow race — independent flows documentMover and documentPermanentDeleter write the same column without locking.
No transaction or row lock observed. Concurrent calls can clobber documents.revision updates.

text.tspan: // no transaction — concurrent move/delete can clobber revision

g.text: await Document.update({ revision: doc.revision + 1, deletedAt: new Date() }, { where });

svg.text: Wrap read-modify-write in a transaction with row lock:
